zh.Of, Ulvasa, Ostergotland, Sweden: 瑞典額斯特格特藍德奧爾奧薩
zh.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag是Bengt Stensson Natt och dag和Kristina Magnusdotter的女兒，出生。她於1450年與Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年之前。

zh-hans.Of, Ulvasa, Ostergotland, Sweden: 瑞典額斯特格特藍德奧爾奧薩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag是Bengt Stensson Natt och dag和Kristina Magnusdotter的女儿，出生。她于1450年与Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Natt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Anit, Gagan, Jagbir, Malkit, Nasib.
Irish or Scottish: shortened form of   McNatt  .
Jewish (American): shortened and altered form of   Nathan  .

variants.name: McNatt
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   McNutt  .

nameMeanings.name: och
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: southern and Silesian variant of   Ach  .
Flemish (Van Och): habitational name for someone from Ogbrugga in Mark (East Flanders), or Ogmolen or Ogpoort in Sint-Renelde (Brabant).
Amerindian (Mexico): Mayan name, from ooch ‘opossum’.

variants.name: Ach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred, Ilse.
German: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Old High German aha ‘running water’.
German: habitational name from any of the places so named in southern Germany and Austria.

nameMeanings.name: dag
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammad, Mohammed, Akram, Arshad, Muneer, Shahid, Tariq, Waseem, Aftab, Akbar, Amir, Anwer.  Jewish Asaf, Reuven, Shaul, Akiva, Dalit.  Indian Ajay, Sanjay, Vinod.
Indian (Kashmir) and Pakistani: Muslim name, probably from the Persian suffix dār ‘holder, possessor, master’.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew dar ‘mother-of-pearl’.

variants.name: Darr
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Dear  .
German (also Därr): variant of Dörr (see Dorr ).

nameMeanings.name: Brita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Birgitta
meanings: Variant of   Brigitta .

variants.name: Birgitte
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Berit
meanings: Contracted variant of   Birgit .

variants.name: Birthe
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Britt
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. en.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag was born as the daughter of Bengt Stensson Natt och dag and Kristina Magnusdotter. She married Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv in 1450. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 1462.

fr.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag est née, fille de Bengt Stensson Natt och dag et Kristina Magnusdotter. Elle a épousé Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1462.

de.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag wurde, als Tochter von Bengt Stensson Natt och dag und Kristina Magnusdotter geboren. Sie hat 1450 Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1462.

it.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag è nata il come figlia di Bengt Stensson Natt och dag e Kristina Magnusdotter. Lei sposato Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv nel 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1462.

ja.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dagはBengt Stensson Natt och dagとKristina Magnusdotterの娘として生まれた。1450年にArend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulvと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag(은)는 Bengt Stensson Natt och dag(와)과 Kristina Magnusdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1450년 Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag nasceu filha de Bengt Stensson Natt och dag e Kristina Magnusdotter. Ela casou-se com Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv em 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1462.

ru.lifeSummary: Brita Bengtsdotter Natt och dag родилась. Её родителей звали Bengt Stensson Natt och dag и Kristina Magnusdotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arend Bengtsson Tillbakaseende ulv в 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1462 г.
